name: Derrick L. Mayiku
tagline: Innovating at the Crossroads of Technology, and Sustainability. Empowering solutions for a smarter, greener, and connected world.
aboutTitle: A Full-Stack Software Engineer, and an AIoT Enthusiast
aboutText: I am a dedicated and innovative Software Engineer specializing in full-stack development and systems engineering. I hold a Master's degree in Computer Applications (Distinction) from JAIN University, awarded under the prestigious "i-Learn" Scholarship by the MEA under the e-VBAB Project. Currently, I serve as the Systems Principal Lead at the National Renewable Energy Platform (NREP), where I oversee IT infrastructure to promote renewable energy initiatives. Passionate about Artificial Intelligence (AI) and the Internet of Things (IoT), I actively explore these areas through research and projects, aiming to integrate them into future innovations to drive global impact in sustainability and technology.

details.label: Degree
details.value: MCA - Computer Science & IT (Distinction) | BSc Computer Science

meta.title: Derrick L. Mayiku
meta.description: Derrick Locha Mayiku is a Software Engineer and Systems Principal Lead specializing in full-stack development, AI, and IoT. Explore his portfolio, resume, and projects in renewable energy and technology innovation.
